Building the Future of AI-Powered Investing
Mintzy is an AI-powered financial intelligence platform that combines machine learning, quantitative research, and adaptive forecasting to help investors make smarter and more confident investment decisions. Equity scripts covered Innovation partners Years of AI research Intelligence products OUR MISSION

Democratizing institutional-grade research
At Mintzy, our mission is to democratize institutional-grade investment research through artificial intelligence, making personalized, data-driven financial insights accessible to every investor.

OUR VISION
Mintzy aims to become the one-stop solution for intelligent investing across cross-asset markets, powered by personalized strategies, AI-driven insights, and data-driven intelligence that empower smarter financial decisions. Explore Mintzy SUPPORTED BY

Backed by Leading Innovation Ecosystems
Mintzy is proud to be part of globally recognized startup and technology programs that accelerate innovation and help us build the future of AI-powered financial intelligence. DPIIT Startup India NVIDIA Inception Program AWS Startups Microsoft for Startups (Azure) Growth Avenue RESEARCH & INNOVATION

Innovation at the heart of Mintzy
We continuously research and develop advanced AI models, quantitative strategies, and adaptive forecasting systems to deliver reliable, personalized, and data-driven investment intelligence across financial markets.

Advanced AI Models
Continuous research into machine learning architectures tuned for financial time series and market signals.

Quantitative Strategies
Rigorous development of systematic strategies backed by data, backtesting, and risk-aware design.

Adaptive Forecasting
Forecasting systems that adapt to changing regimes, volatility, and cross-asset market dynamics.

Personalized Intelligence
Investment insights tailored to individual goals, risk profiles, and portfolio context. FROM THE FOUNDERS

Why we built Mintzy
We started Mintzy because we saw a gap between the sophistication of institutional investment research and what everyday investors could actually access. Markets move fast, data is abundant, but turning that data into confident decisions still felt out of reach for most people. Our goal is simple: bring the rigor of quantitative research and adaptive AI forecasting to every investor — without the complexity. Every product we ship, from our plugin terminal to Seed and API, is built with that mission in mind. Thank you for being part of this journey. We're just getting started. OUR TEAM

Meet The People Behind The Platform
Our team blends AI research, quantitative finance, and product engineering to build smarter tools for more confident investing. Tanmay Chaturvedi Co-founder & CEO Om Kulthe Co-founder & CTO

API Section
Mintzy is a financial information technology company delivering data-driven market forecasting and financial consulting across global financial markets. Our API-driven framework enables scenario-based forecasting for equities, derivatives, and crypto assets. This guide helps you set up the Mintzy SDK and make your first API request within minutes. The SDK is designed for developers, quantitative researchers, and system integrators who require programmatic access to market forecasting and analytical services.

Get Your Access Token
All Mintzy API requests require authentication via an access token. To generate your token: Navigate to the API or account settings section

Generate a new access token
Important: Store your access token securely. Requests made with invalid or expired tokens will return authentication errors.

Access Token Authentication
Mintzy uses token-based authentication to validate API requests. Each client instance must be initialized with a valid access token before making any API calls. Initialization Example PYTHON from Minting import Client client = Client(access_token="<TOKEN_GENERATED>") Python Requirements The Mintzy SDK requires Python 3.7 or higher. Download Python from the official website and follow the installation instructions for your operating system: https://www.python.org/downloads Verify Python Installation Confirm that Python is installed correctly: BASH python --version

Install the Mintzy SDK
To install the Mintzy SDK, run `pip install Minting`. To verify the installation, run `python -c "import Minting; print(Minting.__version__)"`.

Make Your First Prediction
Use the Mintzy client to fetch scenario-based market predictions. Initialize the client with your access token and call the prediction method to retrieve forecasted data. example.py # Initialize Client client = Client(access_token="YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN") # Make Prediction prediction = client.get_prediction( tickers=["RELIANCE"], timeframe="4 hours", parameters=["close"] print(prediction) METHOD

client.get_prediction
Retrieves market predictions for one or more tickers and returns the results in a structured table. Response Format The response is formatted with the following columns: Ticker Date Time Predicted Price Parameters Parameters	Type	Description tickers	list	List of stock tickers timeframe	string	Prediction horizon (e.g., "4 hours")

parameters	list	Prediction fields such as "close"
A non-exhaustive list of supported assets available for forecasting. Research, product notes & market intelligence
Deep dives into AI forecasting, systematic trading infrastructure, and the engineering behind Mintzy's financial intelligence platform.

Build the Intelligence Layer for Financial Markets
Mintzy is building forecasting, automation, and quantitative intelligence infrastructure for the next generation of financial markets. If you're excited by difficult problems, real ownership, and meaningful impact, we'd love to hear from you.

WHAT WE BUILD
Forecasting systems, intelligence APIs, automation infrastructure, and quantitative tooling for modern markets.

HOW WE WORK
Small teams, fast iteration, direct ownership, and a bias toward building instead of discussing.

WHY IT MATTERS
We want advanced market intelligence to be usable by every participant, not only large funds and desks.

WHO WE ARE
AI-native infrastructure for smarter market participation. Mintzy is an AI native financial technology company building forecasting, automation, and quantitative intelligence infrastructure for modern financial markets. We believe institutional-grade market intelligence should not be limited to large funds and trading desks. Our mission is to make advanced forecasting and decision-making systems accessible to every market participant. Today, we're building the technology that powers smarter participation in financial markets from intelligence APIs and automated trading infrastructure to next-generation forecasting systems. Recognized at TiE University's Global Pitch Competition and supported through strategic technology partnerships, we're assembling a team of builders, researchers, and engineers to shape the future of market intelligence.

WHAT WE VALUE
The principles behind the work.

Curiosity Over Credentials
Great ideas can come from anywhere. We value people who ask better questions, learn quickly, and constantly push beyond what they already know.

Ownership Over Titles
At Mintzy, responsibility matters more than hierarchy. We trust people to take initiative, solve problems, and drive outcomes.

Execution Over Meetings
Ideas are valuable only when they become reality. We move quickly, iterate continuously, and focus on building things that create measurable impact.

OPEN ROLES
Join us in building the operating layer for intelligent markets. We are hiring across engineering and research functions that sit close to core product, core infrastructure, and core intelligence systems. TEAM OPENING

Backend & API Engineering
Build the infrastructure powering forecasting systems, broker integrations, and real time market intelligence. You'll design scalable services, APIs, and backend systems that support the next generation of financial technology.

Frontend & Product Engineering
Create products that transform complex financial intelligence into intuitive user experiences. You'll help shape how traders, developers, and institutions interact with Mintzy.

AI & Quantitative Research
Research market behavior, forecasting models, and decision systems that power our intelligence layer. You'll work at the intersection of machine learning, finance, and quantitative analysis.

Infrastructure & Platform Engineering
Build reliable, secure, and scalable systems that support forecasting pipelines, automation frameworks, and production-grade financial infrastructure.

WHY JOIN EARLY?
Early builders shape the company, not just the roadmap. If you want to work on foundational systems, learn quickly, and see your decisions directly affect the product, this is the stage where that happens. Small Team. Large Impact. Early team members influence product direction, architecture decisions, research priorities, and company culture. Your work directly shapes the future of the company.

Real Ownership
We value people who take initiative and think like builders. You'll have the freedom to contribute beyond your job description and the responsibility to help turn ideas into reality.

Work On Difficult Problems
From forecasting systems and AI infrastructure to automation and quantitative research, you'll be working on problems that genuinely matter.

Learn Faster
Startups compress years of learning into months. You'll collaborate closely with engineers, researchers, and operators while building products used by real users in real markets.

READY TO BUILD?
If you're excited by market intelligence, we'd love to hear from you. Whether your background is in AI systems, quantitative research, infrastructure, or product engineering, reach out if you want to help build forecasting and automation systems from the ground up. CONTACT

careers@mintzy.ai

Help us build a better Mintzy
Your feedback directly shapes the future of our platform. Found a bug, have a feature request, or just want to share your thoughts? We're all ears. Share Feedback Frequently Asked Questions

What is Mintzy?
Mintzy is an AI-powered market intelligence platform giving traders and institutions access to personalized strategies and automated trading tools through one broker-independent ecosystem.

Who is Mintzy for?
Two audiences: young professionals (22–35) who want to plug-and-play financial insights and professional traders or brokerage firms that need robust API solutions built for their systems.

Do I need to switch brokers?
No. Mintzy is fully broker independent. It connects seamlessly with Zerodha, Dhan, Upstox, Angel One and more via universal APIs.

How accurate is Mintzy's intelligence?
Our adaptive AI models deliver 86–96% directional accuracy. The system uses continuous regime-learning that adapts to changing market conditions, so performance doesn't degrade over time.

What markets does Mintzy cover?
Equity, equity derivatives and crypto. Coverage scales from 500+ scripts at entry tier to full multi-asset coverage at the advanced tier.

Is Mintzy SEBI-compliant?
Yes. Every insight, alert and recommendation is SEBI-compliant. Regulatory alignment is a core design principle.

What does API pricing look like?
100 free API calls to start. Beyond that usage is priced at ₹3 per call transparent and scalable.

What is the Plugin Framework?
A subscription suite giving you access to equity scripts, automated swing trading, hedging and capital protection tools. Plans start at ₹3L/year.

How does Mintzy make money if clients lose?
It doesn't. Mintzy runs on a 10% profit share plus 10% loss coverage model. We win only when you win.

Is there a free trial?
Yes. API trials are available so you can test Mintzy's intelligence layer before committing to a plan. The Mintzy Guarantee
We take 10% of profits only. We also cover 10% of losses. We don't make money unless you do.

What is the Plugin Framework?
Mintzy's core subscription product. It gives traders automated access to AI-driven swing trading signals, hedging execution and capital protection tools through a plug-in connected to your existing broker.

How does the 10% profit share work?
At the end of each billing cycle Mintzy takes 10% of net realized profits generated through the plugin. No profits means no profit share charge.

What does 10% loss coverage mean?
If the plugin results in a net loss Mintzy covers 10% of that loss. We have skin in the game. We are incentivized to perform — not just to charge.

What is automated swing trading?
The plugin automates identification, entry and exit of medium-term directional trades within predefined risk parameters — so you benefit without monitoring positions manually.

What is the capital protection framework?
Automated risk rules built into the engine — drawdown limits, position sizing controls and hedge triggers — designed to protect capital from outsized losses in adverse conditions.

How many scripts can I trade at once?
Mini covers 500+ scripts, Alpha covers 2000+ and Beta covers the full multi-asset universe. The engine operates on scripts where model confidence is highest.

Do I stay in control?
Yes. You can pause, review or override the plugin at any time. Mintzy has no withdrawal access to your account — it only operates within the trade permissions you grant via your broker's API.

Can I cancel?
Yes at any time. Pending profit share or loss coverage is settled at the end of your current billing period.

Can institutions use the Plugin?
Yes. The architecture scales from individual HNI accounts to enterprise deployments with no performance degradation. Institutional clients are served through the Extension Layer with custom pricing. What exactly is Seed and how does it work?
Seed is an AI native forecasting and market intelligence infrastructure designed for predictive analytics, quantitative workflows, and structured decision support. It combines advanced machine learning with real-time market data to deliver behavioral and liquidity aware forecasts across multiple asset classes.

How reliable are Seed forecasting models?
Forecasts are generated through adaptive models continuously responding to evolving volatility, liquidity movement, and changing market behavior. Accuracy varies based on market conditions, timeframe, and model conviction. Each forecast includes confidence scores reflecting model certainty under current conditions.

Which markets and asset classes are supported?
The infrastructure supports Equity, Derivatives, and Crypto markets through one connected forecasting environment. Access forecasting across 500+ Indian equities, indices, commodities, and cryptocurrencies with synchronized cross-market analysis.

How frequently are predictions and forecasts updated?
Forecasting outputs update continuously based on selected intervals and evolving live market conditions. The system operates in real-time during trading hours with adaptive learning that automatically recalibrates based on new market data.

What trading or investing timeframes are available?
Seed supports intraday, swing, and multi-day analytical workflows across different market structures. From 1-minute to monthly timeframes — predictions work best on 5-minute to hourly charts for intraday and daily to weekly for swing trades.

What do confidence scores actually indicate?
Confidence scores reflect model conviction strength under changing volatility and liquidity environments. Scores range from 0-100%, with above 75% indicating strong conviction, 50-75% moderate confidence, and below 50% weak signals. Confidence helps you filter low-conviction predictions.

How does Seed API pricing work?
Seed APIs operate on a token and usage-based system starting from approximately ₹3 per forecasting call depending on interval configuration, complexity, and infrastructure usage. Each user gets 100 free API calls to start with — no hidden minimums or profit shares. Prediction terminal
A connected prediction workspace with sequential input nodes, a theme toggle for the full terminal, and dedicated output panels for every selected stock. Light terminal Input workspace NODE 01 Access token

OPEN
